steps.title: Identify the Key Signal
steps.content: The word “more” before “deep seclusion” signals that “deep” is intensifying the feeling of withdrawal. The passage describes a secluded scene, and the cliffs evoke thoughts of “more deep” seclusion — a stronger or more profound sense of being withdrawn from the world.

steps.title: Match the Meaning
steps.content: D) Intense is correct. The word “deep” here amplifies seclusion into something profound and powerful—”deep seclusion” means withdrawal experienced with great emotional intensity. The other three describe properties unrelated to this emotional amplification. That matches choice D — D is correct.
